## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- Version / commit: <!-- e.g. v1.2.0 or git SHA -->
